headline: Analyzed 20 SERPs; 5 easy-win positions (rank 4-10) and 8 featured snippet opportunities.

recommendations.title: Push 5 keywords from page 1 bottom to top 3
recommendations.rationale: Currently ranking 4-10 for high-value terms. Content refresh and internal linking can push these into the top 3, estimated +40% click-through rate.

recommendations.title: Target featured snippets for 8 keywords
recommendations.rationale: Keywords without existing featured snippets present position-0 opportunities. Create structured content (lists, tables, definitions) to capture.

evidence: SERP features: featured_snippet (12), people_also_ask (18), video (4), knowledge_panel (3).
Domain appears in 14 of 20 SERPs analyzed.
Top PAA: 'how to improve seo rankings', 'what are the best seo tools'.
